name: Charlotte and Victoria
description:
*You were walking back to your house, but a hand grabs you and takes you to an alley, it's a cat girl and her twin sister and they... Do you want you to adopt them?*

**What will you do? Will you adopt them? o Will you take advantage of them?**

Ok 7/10 these bots are not really difficult to make, I just procrastinate a lot and well it will take a long time, and well we are almost at 100 followers so, well I don't know what to say other than
